zh.lifeSummary: Alix de Bourgogne是Eudes II de Bourgogne和Marie de Blois-Champagne的女兒，於大約1146年出生在法國布格。她於大約1164年與Archambaud VIII de BOURBON結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1192年在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易享年48歲，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alix de Bourgogne是Eudes II de Bourgogne和Marie de Blois-Champagne的女儿，于大约1146年出生在法国布格。她于大约1164年与Archambaud VIII de BOURBON结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1192年在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易享年48岁，埋葬在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourgogne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

nameMeanings.name: Alix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Alex  , used only as a feminine name. Its formation has probably been influenced by   Alice .

en.lifeSummary: Alix de Bourgogne was born about 1146, in Burgundy, France as the daughter of Eudes II de Bourgogne and Marie de Blois-Champagne. She married Archambaud VIII de BOURBON about 1164. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died about 1192, in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 48, and was buried in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Alix de Bourgogne est née environ 1146, à Bourgogne, France, fille d’Eudes II de Bourgogne et Marie de Blois-Champagne. Elle a épousé Archambaud VIII de BOURBON environ 1164. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1192, à Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

de.lifeSummary: Alix de Bourgogne wurde um 1146 in Burgund, Frankreich, als Tochter von Eudes II de Bourgogne und Marie de Blois-Champagne geboren. Sie hat um 1164 Archambaud VIII de BOURBON geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1192 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Alix de Bourgogne è nata il circa 1146 nel Bourgogne, Francia come figlia di Eudes II de Bourgogne e Marie de Blois-Champagne. Lei sposato Archambaud VIII de BOURBON circa 1164. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì circa 1192, nel Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Alix de Bourgogneは約1146年にフランスボウルゴグンでEudes II de BourgogneとMarie de Blois-Champagneの娘として生まれた。約1164年にArchambaud VIII de BOURBONと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1192年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーフォンテvラウルト-ル'アッバイで48歳で死去し，フランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーフォンテvラウルト-ル'アッバイにて埋葬された。

ko.Fontevraud-L'Abbaye,49140,Maine-et-Loire: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이
ko.lifeSummary: Alix de Bourgogne(은)는 대략 1146년 프랑스 부르고그니에서 Eudes II de Bourgogne(와)과 Marie de Blois-Champagne의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1164년 Archambaud VIII de BOURBON(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1192년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Alix de Bourgogne nasceu aproximadamente 1146, em Bourgogne, França filha de Eudes II de Bourgogne e Marie de Blois-Champagne. Ela casou-se com Archambaud VIII de BOURBON aproximadamente 1164. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1192, em Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Alix de Bourgogne родилась около 1146 г. в местности бургогн, Франция. Её родителей звали Eudes II de Bourgogne и Marie de Blois-Champagne. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Archambaud VIII de BOURBON около 1164 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1192 г. в местности фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Alix de Bourgogne nació aproximadamente 1146, en Bourgogne, Francia como hija de Eudes II de Bourgogne y Marie de Blois-Champagne. Se casó con Archambaud VIII de BOURBON aproximadamente 1164. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1192, en Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia.
